subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken around 1912-05-03
subcodes.first_line: Some of you have observed that I have not called attention to any of your individual shortcomings.... I want you to be organized like a flock of the doves of Heaven, whose attitude and conduct toward each other
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @The Holy Spirit
